---
title: "About Us"
subtitle: "20 years of global operational experience. Driven by modern data science."
---

## The Vision Behind planr

**planr** was founded to solve a frustration shared by supply chain executives worldwide: the heavy reliance on fragile, manual spreadsheets to bridge the gaps left by rigid enterprise software.

We do not believe in adding more proprietary software layers or complex user licenses to your tech stack. Instead, our mission is to deliver **agile, code-driven operational mathematics** directly into your existing ecosystem. By turning supply chain logic into clean, reproducible R code, we help global organizations eliminate manual data preparation, stabilize their S&OP cycles, and unlock true inventory visibility.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Leadership & Technical Expertise

Our consulting frameworks are designed and led by a veteran supply chain architect with a unique blend of deep operational leadership and advanced analytics engineering.

### 🌍 20 Years of Global Operations

Having spent two decades directing end-to-end supply chain functions across both **Europe (France)** and **Asia-Pacific (Japan, Singapore, Taiwan)**, we understand the real-world pressures of local markets and global networks. This extensive cross-cultural exposure shapes planning frameworks that are both highly adaptable and resilient to global disruptions.

### 🏢 Cross-Industry Perspective

Our methodologies have been proven, scaled, and refined across highly regulated, fast-moving, and complex value chains: \* **Alcohol & Spirits:** Navigating high seasonality, complex promotional blocks, and long-lead-time distribution network challenges. \* **Pharmaceuticals & Medical Devices:** Managing strict service levels, cold chain logistics, and high-stakes demand volatility. \* **Cosmetics:** Balancing rapid product lifecycles, high SKU-complexity, and strict inventory turnover targets.

### 🛠️ Deep Domain Mastery

Having held nearly every critical seat at the planning table—including **Demand Manager, Supply Planning Manager, Digital Supply Chain Leader, Global S&OP Leader, and Supply Chain Analytics Manager**—we do not look at your data through a purely theoretical lens. We understand the precise operational bottlenecks your teams face every week because we have managed them firsthand.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Bridging the Gap: Business Intelligence & R

While traditional Business Intelligence (BI) tools are excellent for looking backward and reporting historical metrics, modern supply chains require **forward-looking, predictive mathematics** to stay agile.

Having worked deeply with standard enterprise architectures and advanced BI frameworks since 2015, we recognized that the ultimate competitive advantage lies in statistical programming. **R is our engine of choice.** It allows us to build bespoke, reproducible data pipelines that automate complex operations—such as bucket splits, dynamic inventory coverage simulations, and rules-based demand allocations—in seconds.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Commitment to the Supply Chain Community

We believe that the future of supply chain excellence belongs to open-source innovation and education. Our commitment to advancing the field is driven by two core pillars:

### 🎓 Academic Leadership

We actively shape the next generation of supply chain leaders by teaching advanced Master’s degree modules at leading **Business Schools and Engineering Schools in France**. This keeps our consulting frameworks at the absolute cutting edge of academic theory and industry practice.

### 📦 The `planr` R Package

We are the authors and developers of the open-source **`planr` R package**. Designed explicitly for supply chain professionals, `planr` encapsulates industry-standard planning mathematics—such as DRP calculations, projected inventory snapshots, and short shelf-life risk tracking—into highly efficient, open-source R functions.

When you partner with us, you are not getting generic consultants; you are working directly with the engineers who write the tools that automate modern supply chain analytics.

# Our Philosophy

We believe that standard supply chain software is too heavy, and standard spreadsheets are too fragile.

**planr** was founded on a simple premise: **Supply Chain Management is fundamentally about transparent, predictable mathematics.** Our consulting methodology is heavily inspired by the philosophy of the open-source `planr` R ecosystem—delivering modular, fast, and completely customizable tools that adapt to your unique constraints rather than forcing you into a proprietary software box.

# Who We Serve

We partner with Supply Chain Directors, Demand Managers, and S&OP Leads who are tired of fighting technical debt. If you have data in an ERP, data in a warehouse, and want a clean, lightning-fast mathematical engine to turn those pipelines into a cohesive operational roadmap, we design the code to get you there.
